metadata.description: Keel — anti-AI-slop landing page design with deterministic OKLCH theming and SSR correctness gates

plugins.name: keel
plugins.description: Design skill for landing and marketing pages. Computes a distinctive theme deterministically from a seed (OKLCH palette + font pairing, gamut- and contrast-fitted), and enforces SSR/hydration correctness — no dark-mode flash, no hydration mismatch, nothing invisible until JavaScript arrives. Verbs: audit, hydrate, redesign.
